title: Crispy Uruguayan Beef Stir-fry
description: A savory, crisp low-carb-friendly dish featuring uruguayan beef with added lemongrass for a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Wash and chop the beef sirloin into bite-sized pieces.
Finely slice the lemon grass and mince the garlic cloves.
In a pan, heat up oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and lemongrass for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the beef pieces to the pan and stir fry for about 5 minutes or until browned on all sides.
Remove from heat and add soy sauce to the pan, stirring well to coat the beef evenly with sauce.
Serve hot as a main course.
